title: aleuritia deflexa
intro: Aleuritia deflexa, also known as Aleurites moluccana, is a plant species native to parts of Asia and Australia, known for its seeds and oil extracted from it. The medicinal properties of Aleurites moluccana seeds include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and protect against certain types of cancer. Aleurites moluccana seeds and oil can be used in herbal preparations such as capsules, tinctures, and infused oils, which are often used to support heart health and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease.
